subparts.text: Explain area moment theorem for slope and deflection calculating of beams.
Write down steps to design steel beam as per IS – 800 code.
Calculate moment of resistance of timber beam width 150 mm, depth = 200mm permissible bending stress = 12n/mm2
Explain continuous beam draw bending moment and shear force diagram with uniformly distributed load on beams.
Draw span & support moment of a fixed end beam. Having span = 6m and UDL = 20kn/m.
Explain analysis of flexural members. Name any two method for calculating slope & deflection of beam.
List various standard steel structural sections normally manufactured in India. List their common applications.

Design steel beam. Loading = 52kn/m, Span = 6m. Allowable bending stress = 165N/mm2, Shear stress = 100N/mm2. Beam size ISLB 500 Zxx = 1543.2 cm3 Beam size ISWB 450 Zxx = 1558.1 cm3 Check for shear and deflection of beam. Assume web thickness 10.5mm.
What are merits & demerits of steel structure compared to timber structure.
